results.title: Persian carpet — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain Wikipedia article on Persian carpets describes Senneh knot weaving but contains no LLM/embedding retrieval application.

results.title: Turkish vs Persian Knot — Catalina Rug
results.judge_reason: Commercial rug-trade blog comparing Senneh vs Ghiordes knots, no LLM retrieval content present.

results.title: Persian Rug Glossary
results.judge_reason: Generic glossary of Persian rug terminology without any LLM embedding or retrieval polarity discussion.

results.title: CMedTEB & CARE Asymmetric Encoders (2026/4)
results.judge_reason: Uses asymmetric query/document encoder for medical retrieval but lacks the 2D lattice directional-pixel KPSI-density framing of the candidate.

results.title: LLM-QL: Query Likelihood Modeling (2025/4)
results.judge_reason: Asymmetric attention block for query likelihood is directionally asymmetric but not a 2D grid of directional pixel embeddings with density-controlled resolution.

results.title: Theoretical Limits of Embedding-Based Retrieval (ICLR 2026)
results.judge_reason: Establishes capacity bounds for embedding retrieval (acknowledged in novelty_claim) but does not propose directional/asymmetric Senneh-style lattice.

results.title: Large Reasoning Embedding Models LREM (2025/10)
results.judge_reason: Reasoning-augmented dense embeddings without directional polarity or 2D-lattice density framing.

results.title: Survey of Model Architectures in IR (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Broad IR architecture survey covering many approaches; not a specific directional 2D-lattice retrieval proposal.

fail_reason: Result 0 (Wikipedia Persian carpet) matches >= 2 content_words from source-domain ('Persian carpet', 'Senneh knot'), triggering keyword_overlap hit under strict OR rule.
